D4 Colorimetry L2 Understand Atom

The HSV Hexcone

slide the value and watch the hue-saturation disc brighten from a single black point to a full colour wheel

HSV is a designer's remap of RGB: hue as an angle, saturation as distance from the axis, value as height. The solid is a hexcone — full at the top, a black point at the bottom.

Slide the value. Each slice is a colour wheel whose radius is saturation; at low value it shrinks toward black. The side profile marks where the cut sits in the hexcone.
